title: Poovayya & Co makes 4 Partners
description: Poovayya & Co has announced annual promotions across its Bengaluru and New Delhi offices. This significant promotion cycle comes as the firm celebrates the 30th year of its operations.The following lawyers have been made Partners:Ankit Agarwal | New DelhiAkshata Benegal | BengaluruAbhilash Vaidyanathan| BengaluruShristi Widge| BengaluruThe Firm has also made two new Senior Associates: Samjyor Lepcha (Bengaluru) and Kaainat Pundir (New Delhi)All the promotions span the firm’s Dispute Resoluti
